# Product Pulse Weekly

*Generated by Product Pulse Phase 4*

Product Pulse: 2025-12-17 to 2026-03-10

Report period: 2025-12-17 to 2026-03-10. Total reviews analyzed: 402.


## KEY THEMES

- Poor Customer Support: Users report difficulty in getting help from the support team, with some experiencing unhelpful or dismissive responses. (45 reviews)
- App Performance Issues: Users report problems with app stability, slow performance, and syncing issues. (34 reviews)
- User Experience and Interface: Users are unhappy with the app's user experience, interface, and navigation. (34 reviews)
- Features and Functionality: Users are requesting additional features, improvements to existing ones, and better organization of the app. (27 reviews)
- Security and Trust: Users are concerned about data sharing, security, and the trustworthiness of the app. (17 reviews)

## VOICE OF THE USER

- 1/5 stars: "most of time unable to purchase any stocks it keeps says 'something went wrong' please fix this to retain your customers"
- 5/5 stars: "this is the best app for traders and investors for the long term because in this app brokerage charges are so negligible"
- 2/5 stars: "The worst part is the customer support... you can request a call back... but that's only a dream... you never get a call back from IND money..."

## RECOMMENDED ACTIONS

- Implement a more robust customer support system with faster response times and better follow-up.
- Simplify the user interface, improve navigation, and add features to make the app more user-friendly.
- Fix bugs and glitches in the app to improve user experience and add more features to make the app more user-friendly.
